protein_name: Isoform 2: Receptor for adenosine. The activity of this receptor is mediated by G proteins which inhibits adenylyl cyclase. Isoform 1: Plays a suppressive role in osteosarcoma malignancy by inhibiting NF-kappa-B activity. Belongs to the G-protein coupled receptor 1 family. Expressed in the lung and bone. Expressed at lower levels in osteosarcoma tissues (at protein level). 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
